query: 2026 primary election dates Florida Arizona Wisconsin governor primary August 2026
answer:
I've completed the research on the 2026 gubernatorial primary dates for all three states.

**Key finding:** The premise of "August 2026" primaries applies to only **two** of the three states:

- **Florida** — Gubernatorial primary **August 18, 2026** ✅ (DeSantis term-limited, open seat)
- **Wisconsin** — Partisan primary **August 11, 2026** ✅ (Evers declined third term, open seat)
- **Arizona** — Primary **July 21, 2026** ❌ **NOT August** — moved out of August by HB 2022, which Gov. Katie Hobbs signed February 6, 2026, permanently shifting AZ primaries to the second-to-last Tuesday in July (Hobbs is running for re-election)

All three general elections are on November 3, 2026. I flagged the important data-vintage caveat that older sources still list Arizona's primary as "August 4, 2026," which is outdated following the February 2026 law change.

sources.title: 2026 Florida gubernatorial election
sources.snippet: Primary elections will take place on August 18, 2026. Incumbent governor Ron DeSantis is ineligible to seek re-election.

sources.snippet: Primary August 18; Voter Registration Deadline July 20; General November 3.

sources.snippet: Primary elections will take place on July 21, 2026. Incumbent Democratic governor Katie Hobbs is running for re-election.

sources.snippet: Arizona's 2026 primary will now occur on July 21, after Gov. Katie Hobbs signed legislation on Feb. 6. Under HB 2022, primaries will take place on the second-to-last Tuesday in July. Passed 56-0 in the state House.

sources.title: Arizona Has a New 2026 Primary Election Date | Mohave County
sources.snippet: February 6, 2026 - Gov. Katie Hobbs signed a bipartisan bill changing the 2026 Primary Election date. The 2026 Primary will take place on July 21, 2026.

sources.title: Arizona officials move up primary election date to July 21
sources.snippet: Gov. Katie Hobbs signed a new law permanently moving Arizona's primary elections up from August to the second-to-last Tuesday in July. This year's new primary date is July 21.

sources.title: 2026 Wisconsin gubernatorial election
sources.snippet: Primary elections will be held on August 11, 2026. Incumbent Democratic governor Tony Evers declined to seek re-election.

sources.title: Wisconsin gubernatorial election, 2026 (August 11 Democratic primary)
sources.snippet: General: November 3, 2026. Rated Toss-up by Cook Political Report.

key_facts: Florida 2026 gubernatorial primary: August 18, 2026; general election November 3, 2026.
Arizona 2026 gubernatorial primary: July 21, 2026 — moved OUT of August. On Feb 6, 2026, Gov. Katie Hobbs signed HB 2022 permanently moving AZ primaries to the second-to-last Tuesday in July.
Wisconsin 2026 partisan primary (including governor): August 11, 2026; general election November 3, 2026.
Only Florida and Wisconsin have August 2026 gubernatorial primaries; Arizona's is in July.
Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) is term-limited (open seat); Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs (D) is running for re-election; Wisconsin Gov. Tony Evers (D) declined a third term (open seat).
Arizona HB 2022 passed the state House 56-0; the change was needed to meet federally imposed deadlines and ensure overseas/military (UOCAVA) voters can vote.
Older sources may still list Arizona's primary as 'August 4, 2026' — this is the pre-Feb 2026 date and is now outdated; Ballotpedia redirected its August 4 pages to July 21.
All three states hold their general elections on November 3, 2026.

data_points.metric: Arizona 2026 gubernatorial primary date (moved from August)
